children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall conduct an advanced scientific computing research and development program that includes activities related to applied mathematics and activities authorized by the American Super Computing Leadership Act of 2017 ( et seq.).15 U.S.C. 5541

children.heading: Goal
children.label: 2 Goal
children.text: The Secretary shall carry out the program with the goal of supporting departmental missions, and providing the high-performance computational, networking, advanced visualization technologies, and workforce resources, that are required for world leadership in science.
